title: Slightly Improved Font (32x)
description: This resource pack adds a slightly improved version of vanilla Minecraft font (32x version)
body:
That's it, that's all it does. This resource pack adds a slightly improved version of vanilla Minecraft font - a redraw of original font at 32x. You can see what it looks like down below!

It's licensed MIT and you are free to use it in your modpacks and videos / streams.

![](https://i.imgur.com/4y11sHi.png)

You will want to enable this resource pack on top of your vanilla game / resource pack.

![](https://i.imgur.com/fnYLbLk.png)

Now supports unicode characters too!

![](https://i.imgur.com/3udcSxQ.png)

[![](https://links.latvian.dev/links.png?mr=slightlyimprovedfont)](https://links.latvian.dev/)

[![](https://links.latvian.dev/partner.png)](https://links.latvian.dev/partner)
